# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-026](task-0093): Provider Event Bus

## Purpose

Implement provider event bus.

## Scope

- Event format
- Publishing
- Subscribing

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement publishing
3. Add subscribing

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Publishing works
3. Subscribing works
